name: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
description: Detects indicators of insufficient logging and monitoring including exposed log files, verbose error messages with stack traces, missing security event logging, and debug endpoints left enabled in production.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Disable all debug endpoints in production. Remove phpinfo(), server-status, and actuator endpoints or restrict to internal access only. Implement comprehensive security event logging. Set up real-time alerting for suspicious activities.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Debug endpoints expose environment variables (including secrets), database credentials, and internal architecture details. Exposed .env files are actively scanned by botnets and are a top source of credential theft.
